violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The deli Slicer was properly cleaned and sanitized by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Several food items prepared on site and frozen for storage were observed not re-datemarked with 6 days from the date of thawing. PIC is to ensure frozen prepped items are re-datemarked and not held no longer than 7 days from the date of prep (Prep date is day 1, thawing date is day 2). New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Spray bottles containing Chemicals/Cleaners were stored hanging from the clean equipment shelf over a prep table in the back kitchen area. Spray bottles were relocated for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The screen door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting (gap at the base). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The smooth surface wall located behind the mop sink is worn and exposing the raw material of the wall board. The wall board is to be resealed to ensure it is smooth, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
